summary: Full backend regression on A.L.E.X. v2.0 dynamic schema. Wrote 19 pytest tests covering Categories CRUD (defaults, upsert, auto-id, soft/hard archive, include_archived), Debts CRUD, Settings new schema (old flat fields stripped), MonthlyEntry dict-based (contributions/balances/debt_payments) with upsert-by-mese, Dashboard cumulative math + FSI/PAC/fondo_emergenza/allocation, per-debt debt-plan, Goals CRUD, Backup export/import roundtrip, migration verification (no legacy flat fields remain), and AI /ai/analyze Claude Sonnet 4.5 smoke test. 19/19 passed in 33.9s.
passed: GET /api/ v2.0 metadata
GET /api/categories returns 7 seeded defaults with correct kind (etf/satellite/priamo/fondo_figlia/fondo_famiglia=accumulation; revolut/conto_deposito=balance)
GET /api/categories?include_archived=true includes archived
POST /api/categories auto-generates id when empty string passed
POST /api/categories upserts existing id (V1 -> V2 verified)
DELETE /api/categories/{id} soft-archives and returns was_used_in_entries
DELETE /api/categories/{id}?hard=true removes completely
POST/GET/DELETE /api/debts full CRUD with soft+hard delete and include_archived filter
POST /api/debts auto-generates id when empty
GET /api/settings returns new schema only (saldo_iniziale_etf, debito_zio_* stripped)
PUT /api/settings persists entrate/spese/mesi/paracadute/saldo_iniziale_fondo_emergenza/data_primo_mese
POST /api/monthly-entries with dict contributions/balances/debt_payments; upsert-by-mese preserves id
GET /api/dashboard returns categories, debts (with residuo_iniziale/attuale/pagato/rata_mensile), last, history, fsi (with sub), pac_sustainability, fondo_emergenza, allocation (with color)
Cumulative math verified: initial_balance=1000 + contributi 200 + 300 = 1500 in accum
Debt residuo verified: 2000 initial - 200 paid = 1800 residuo_attuale
GET /api/debt-plan/{id} returns piano array + mesi_rimanenti + data_estinzione; 404 for missing
POST/GET/DELETE /api/goals roundtrip
GET /api/backup/export v2.0 includes settings, categories, debts, monthly_entries, watchlist, goals
POST /api/backup/import replace=true wipes + restores; 7 default categories preserved after roundtrip
Migration: no legacy flat fields (contributo_etf, saldo_liquidita_revolut, pagamento_debito_zio) remain in any monthly_entries; all have dict contributions/balances/debt_payments
POST /api/ai/analyze Claude Sonnet 4.5 returns valid JSON with required keys and decisione_finale in {BUY,HOLD,SELL,WATCH}
critical_code_review_comments: bootstrap_defaults(): the .replace().replace() chain building 'key' at line 145 is dead code (never used); result overridden by explicit old_key = f'saldo_iniziale_{c[id]}'. Harmless but confusing; recommend removing.
backup_import: does not upsert on 'mese' collision cleanly if replace=False and duplicates exist; currently OK since replace=True default wipes first.
server.py is 733 lines — approaching the 700-line threshold; consider splitting routes into modules (categories/debts/entries/dashboard/ai) for maintainability.
get_settings_doc strips unknown keys via Settings.model_fields check — good defensive coding for migration.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed categories/debts/goals and 2099-XX monthly entries; all cleaned up after each test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v2.0 dynamic schema fully working. Use /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py as regression base. When adding new features, extend this file. Migration from v1 flat schema verified. AI test takes ~15-25s. Frontend intentionally skipped per review_request.
